description: Round 1 HNSW perf optimization: batch serialize/deserialize I/O + eliminate to_vec()
commits: 803de8c perf(hnsw): batch vector/ID writes in write_to (134M -> 2K write_all calls)
16186e8 perf(hnsw): batch vector/ID reads in read_from (134M -> 2K read_exact calls)
51055be perf(hnsw): eliminate per-node to_vec() in add/add_profiled
5c69d16 feat(ffi): add optional search tracing via KNOWHERE_RS_TRACE_SEARCH env var
notes: Round 1 optimizations significantly improved optimize and load. QPS bottleneck remains, likely in Milvus-integrated query dispatch path (serial nq=1 calls vs batch). Standalone RS HNSW achieves ~1380 QPS vs Milvus-integrated 286 QPS (4.8x overhead).
